condition: User asks for real quote / current price
reason: Static ranges are not live quotes. Require carrier quote, fuel, toll, ferry and capacity data.

condition: Lane distance known but toll/ferry/border costs unknown
reason: Line-haul estimate can be computed, but total landed road cost is incomplete.

condition: Fuel price not refreshed from live source
reason: Diesel prices change weekly; EU Weekly Oil Bulletin or national fuel data should be checked.

condition: Ferry/tunnel leg present and live booking unavailable
reason: Ferry/tunnel prices vary by date, vehicle, peak day, surcharges and availability.
Abnormal movement cost can dominate total price and requires route-specific authority/carrier confirmation.

condition: Customs broker/admin costs unknown for cross-border non-EU move
reason: Customs/admin can materially change cost and readiness.
